'''fathoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatromelia|iatromelia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatromelia|iatromelia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fathoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætheyeth|fætheyeth]] || [[word:fætheyej|fætheyej]] || [[word:fætheyesh|fætheyesh]] || [[word:fætheye|fætheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathothoyoth|fathothoyoth]] || [[word:fathothoyoj|fathothoyoj]] || [[word:fathothoyosh|fathothoyosh]] || [[word:fathothoyo|fathothoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathoyoth|fathoyoth]] || [[word:fathoyoj|fathoyoj]] || [[word:fathoyosh|fathoyosh]] || [[word:fathoyo|fathoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathofyofth|fathofyofth]] || [[word:fathofyofj|fathofyofj]] || [[word:fathofyofsh|fathofyofsh]] || [[word:fathofyof|fathofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathoyotho|fathoyotho]] || [[word:fathoyojo|fathoyojo]] || [[word:fathoyosho|fathoyosho]] || [[word:fathoyoko|fathoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathoyoth|fathoyoth]] || [[word:fathoyoj|fathoyoj]] || [[word:fathoyosh|fathoyosh]] || [[word:fathoyo|fathoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathoyothol|fathoyothol]] || [[word:fathoyojol|fathoyojol]] || [[word:fathoyoshol|fathoyoshol]] || [[word:fathoyokol|fathoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathoyoothotho|fathoyoothotho]] || [[word:fathoyoojojo|fathoyoojojo]] || [[word:fathoyooshosho|fathoyooshosho]] || [[word:fathoyooko|fathoyooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathoyothon|fathoyothon]] || [[word:fathoyojon|fathoyojon]] || [[word:fathoyoshon|fathoyoshon]] || [[word:fathoyokon|fathoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathoyothooro|fathoyothooro]] || [[word:fathoyojooro|fathoyojooro]] || [[word:fathoyoshooro|fathoyoshooro]] || [[word:fathoyokooro|fathoyokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
